flags.name: --host
flags.desc_zh: Check host integration. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
flags.raw: Check host integration. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro

raw:
Usage:
  npx @garrytan/gstack doctor [opts]

Diagnose install issues for the gstack skill pack.

Options:
  --host <id>    Check host integration. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
  --quiet, -q    Suppress non-essential output
  --yes, -y      Skip confirmation prompts

summary_zh: 在当前项目启用指定 skill。

flags.name: --host
flags.desc_zh: Register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
flags.raw: Register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro

flags.name: --no-commit
flags.desc_zh: Stage changes but do not commit
flags.raw: Stage changes but do not commit

raw:
Usage:
  npx @garrytan/gstack enable <name> [opts]

Enable a skill in the current project.

Arguments:
  <name>         Skill name to enable

Options:
  --host <id>    Register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
  --tier <t>     Use required or optional tier
  --prefix       Use gstack-* skill names
  --no-prefix    Use flat skill names
  --no-commit    Stage changes but do not commit
  --yes, -y      Skip confirmation prompts

flags.name: --host
flags.desc_zh: Filter or register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
flags.raw: Filter or register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro

raw:
Usage:
  npx @garrytan/gstack list [opts]

List available skills from the gstack skill pack.

Options:
  --host <id>    Filter or register with host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
  --prefix       Use gstack-* skill names
  --no-prefix    Use flat skill names
  --quiet, -q    Suppress non-essential output
  --yes, -y      Skip confirmation prompts

summary_zh: 显示安装版本、hosts 和设置。

flags.name: --host
flags.desc_zh: Show status for host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
flags.raw: Show status for host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro

raw:
Usage:
  npx @garrytan/gstack status [opts]

Show install version, hosts, and current settings.

Options:
  --host <id>    Show status for host. Valid: claude, codex, factory, opencode, kiro
  --prefix       Show prefixed skill-name mode
  --no-prefix    Show flat skill-name mode
  --quiet, -q    Suppress non-essential output
